name: Lover's Salad with Strawberry Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the vinaigrette: In a blender or food processor, puree the defrosted strawberries. Add the balsamic vinegar, olive oil, Dijon mustard, salt, and ground black pepper. Blend until smooth. Refrigerate until ready to use.
2. To prepare the salad:
- Break off the ends of the asparagus and cut on the diagonal into 2-inch pieces.
- Bring a pan of water to a boil, add the asparagus, and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender. Drain and rinse in cold water until chilled. Pat dry.
- Clean and tear the Boston lettuce and baby greens into bite-size pieces. Put into a large bowl and cover with paper towels. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
- When ready to serve, combine the asparagus, greens, shredded carrot, crumbled feta cheese, and toasted almond slivers. Toss with about half the vinaigrette, using just enough to lightly coat the salad ingredients.
